creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-12 22:19:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-LaTeX-Pod Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  LaTeX::Pod converts LaTeX sources to Perl's POD (Plain old
  documentation) format. Currently only a subset of the available
  LaTeX language is supported.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/LaTeX-Pod/
  
  PR:             ports/136639
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1352    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Pod/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Pod/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Pod/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Pod/pkg-plist (new)
